# GRA Release Radar developer context

GRA Release Radar publishes static agent discovery files and markdown documentation.

Important URLs:
- /openapi.json documents static discovery resources.
- /.well-known/agent.json describes capabilities.
- /.well-known/agent-card.json describes A2A metadata.
- /.well-known/mcp/server-card.json is a static MCP card and explicitly states no live MCP transport is operated.
- /status.json describes the static client architecture.

Do not claim GRA has a hosted analysis API, streaming API, CLI, SDK, or live MCP tool endpoint.
